text.message: come on blue, it has been one turn u havent robbed me yet
nah, the other two are bots, been robbed twice
do u have a city already?
and u are offering a nb for a city?
and u also choose to race me
u are fairly ahead, i dont want u to settle
yeah, true, but extortion isnt moral either
how is non biding not part of the game if extortion is part of the game?
please blue, cut him off a thierd time
last turn u gave it cheaper to blue
come on, dont trade with oj
i mean, if oj is throwing the game on purpuse, and u trade with oj, thats cheating
like, u won already, why trade with oj
is funny that u would rather waste ur time throwing a game u dont care bout
